explainability.path_to_improvement: Document how explanations are provided to users affected by AI decisions.

external_accountability.path_to_improvement: Obtain external validation of AI practices or require vendor certifications.

fairness.path_to_improvement: Document bias testing procedures or vendor AI fairness requirements.

governance.path_to_improvement: Document AI governance structure, including oversight of vendor AI tools.

oversight.path_to_improvement: Document human review processes for AI-assisted decisions (built or vendor AI).

privacy.findings: The Fidelity National Financial Privacy Notice describes data collection practices for site analysis and personalization. This privacy policy document implies automated processing of user data.
privacy.path_to_improvement: Publish AI-specific privacy impact assessments or data handling procedures.

relevant_sources.summary: The Fidelity National Financial Privacy Notice (Jan 2025) provides evidence for the **privacy** pillar. This privacy policy document supports the privacy pillar by describing data collection practices for site analysis and personalization, which implies automated processing of user data.
relevant_sources.title: Fidelity National Financial Privacy Notice (Jan 2025)

transparency.path_to_improvement: Document AI systems in use, including vendor/third-party AI tools.

summary.overall_findings: Fidelity National Financial's privacy policy describes data collection practices for site analysis and personalization. This pillar is the only one of 7 evaluated responsible AI pillars with documented evidence, as no qualifying public evidence was found for the majority of the 7 evaluated pillars. These findings are based on a review of 7 publicly available sources.
